questions.question: This 2000 film stars independent ladies Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore, and Lucy Liu working together as private detectives.
This group released the album "Nevermind" in 1991.
Using stop-motion animation, this 2000 film sees a group of chickens trying to escape their owners.
This actress is best known for her starring role as Dana Scully in "The X-Files."
First appearing in 1988's "Hairspray," this actress went on to host her own daytime talk show, which ran from 1993 to 2004.
